monitoring_recommendation: Retrain if WAPE grows by 10pp, bias exceeds +/-0.5 units, or data drift persists for 2 refresh cycles.

business_alert_backtest_21d.primary_use: Prioritize dealer review, not exact sales or stockout guarantees.
business_alert_backtest_21d.interpretation: Low precision/recall here means the alert heuristic is conservative/noisy on synthetic holdout windows; forecast accuracy is evaluated separately in model_metrics.json.
business_alert_backtest_21d.note: Backtest proxy pe ferestre de 21 zile: forecastul este folosit ca ranking/risc, nu ca promisiune exacta de vanzari.
